title: State Cryptography Administration Announcement No. 55 (National Cryptography Science Fund, 2nd batch guidelines)
description: OSCCA announcement (29 Jan 2026) releasing application guidelines for the second batch of the National Cryptography Science Fund. First research direction is explicitly 'anti-quantum computing cryptography key theory and technology' (抗量子计算密码关键理论与技术), including quantum provable security theory and quantum-resistant algorithms.

title: State Cryptography Administration Announcement No. 55 (mirror on nca.gov.cn)
description: Duplicate of OSCCA Announcement No. 55 on an alternate official OSCCA host.

title: Announcement on launching the new-generation commercial cryptographic algorithm solicitation
description: Commercial Cryptography Standards Research Institute (ICCS) announcement (5 Feb 2025) launching a global solicitation for next-generation public key, hash and block cipher algorithms to address quantum computing threats, for standardisation.

title: Notice soliciting comments on Public Key Cryptographic Algorithm Submission Requirements and Evaluation Criteria (drafts)
description: ICCS notice (5 Feb 2025) seeking public comment on draft submission requirements and evaluation criteria for the next-generation public key algorithm call responding to quantum computing threats.

title: Notice soliciting proposals for new-generation public key cryptographic algorithms
description: ICCS notice (9 Oct 2025) formally opening proposal submission for next-generation public key cryptographic algorithms (part of the quantum-threat-driven NGCC program), deadline 30 June 2026.

title: Notice soliciting proposals for new-generation cryptographic hash algorithms
description: ICCS notice (Oct 2025) opening proposal submission for next-generation cryptographic hash algorithms under the same quantum-threat-driven NGCC solicitation program.

title: Quantum Information Technology Development and Application Research Report (2023)
description: CAICT (China Academy of Information and Communications Technology) research report (Dec 2023) covering quantum information technology including NIST post-quantum cryptography (PQC) standardisation progress and global strategy/investment landscape.

title: State Cryptography Administration Announcement No. 50 (19 commercial cryptography industry standards)
description: OSCCA announcement (27 Dec 2024) releasing 19 commercial cryptography industry standards (e.g. ZUC GM/T 0001.4-2024). No explicit post-quantum content.

title: Research on Key Issues of Post-Quantum Cryptography Upgrade and Migration (journal article)
description: Authored academic article in CAICT journal 'Information and Communications Technology and Policy' (2025, Vol 51(7)) on PQC upgrade/migration key issues.

title: TC260 2025 first batch of national cybersecurity standard requirements
description: National Cybersecurity Standardization Technical Committee (TC260) notice releasing the 2025 first batch of national cybersecurity standard needs; PQC relevance not confirmed in snippet.

title: Beijing Municipal Cryptography Administration - PQC latest progress (Apr 2025)
description: Beijing Municipal Cryptography Administration industry-news page summarising latest post-quantum cryptography developments (April 2025); a news roundup rather than an original policy document.
